# subscript(_:)

**Instance Subscript**

Access the question box that the identifier denotes, if any.

## Declaration

```swift
subscript(questionBoxID: AssignableDocument.QuestionBox.ID) -> AssignableDocument.QuestionBox? { get set }
```

## Accessing documents

- **subscript(_:)**: Access the page that the identifier denotes, if any.
- **subscript(_:)**: Access the question that the identifier denotes, if any.

items.description: Access the page that the identifier denotes, if any.
items.name: subscript(_:)

items.description: Access the question that the identifier denotes, if any.
items.name: subscript(_:)

title: subscript(_:)
